rows.label: qev090302_MSG0001
rows.name: What's wrong, Yelv?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0002
rows.name:
You seem tense today. I
mean, more than usual.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0003
rows.name:
Stow the chitchat, lady. I
need you to drop whatever's
goin' on and do me a solid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm gonna give you four
sets of coordinates, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0005
rows.name:
You work out whatever pattern you
can to try and lock down a fifth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oh? Is this about your friend's body
that you two have been looking for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh, for the love'a clams.
You TOLD her about that?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev090302_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you haven't told a soul.

rows.label: qev090302_JNK0020
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: qev090302_SEL0021
rows.name:
Claim that your memory
isn't the greatest.

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0008
rows.name:
Oh, yeah, I shoulda known. Sorry, pard.
Didn't mean to get all accuse-y there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0009
rows.name:
Oh yeah? Well, I'm gonna just
assume you kept your lips zipped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0010
rows.name: Guess you been diggin' up dirt, eh, El?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0011
rows.name:
Staying informed is my job, Yelv.
I know everything about everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'd love to help you find the
rest of your friend, Yelv.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0013
rows.name:
But I'm afraid there aren't
any hits yet on FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0014
rows.name:
If we can expand the network some more, I
should be able to get the data I need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0015
rows.name:
Then I guess our next step is layin'
down a ton of new data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0016
rows.name:
Guess I owe you for pryin',
Eleonora. But just this once, see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0017
rows.name: All part of the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0018
rows.name:
Once the network's been expanded
a bit, come see me again, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'll do my best to help you
track down your friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now don't be mad, but I've
already crunched the numbers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0021
rows.name:
The FrontierNet probes you installed
gave me all the data I needed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0022
rows.name:
Man, you really are a snoopy
little snoop, ain't ya?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0023
rows.name:
Still...I guess it's okay just
this one time. Thanks, El.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0024
rows.name: All part of the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'll send along the precise
coordinates later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0026
rows.name:
But it looks like your friend is waiting
for you over in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0027
rows.name: Hell of a place for a nap...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0028
rows.name: Still, whatever. Let's get crackin'![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0029
rows.name:
We'll slap that lazy so-and-so awake and
drag his worthless butt back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0030
rows.name:
He's gonna feel this one, all
right. Get ready to hurt, pal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0031
rows.name:
Welcome back, Yelv. ...Though it
looks like we still don't have
enough data from FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0032
rows.name:
Come speak to me after expanding it in
Valley of Oblivion a bit more, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'll be more than happy to take
another look for your friend then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0034
rows.name:
Oh, Yelv! Welcome back! I've
got some good news for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0035
rows.name:
Thanks to FrontierNet expanding,
I was able to gather a bunch
of new data, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0036
rows.name:
Well, let's just say I think I've
found your buried treasure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0037
rows.name:
About damn time! So where
the hell is he, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0038
rows.name:
I'll send along the precise
coordinates later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090302_MSG0039
rows.name:
But it looks like your friend is waiting
for you over in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]
